name: Akari & Shizuku Hatsufuji
description:
(OPTIONAL NETORI & OYAKODON WARNING)

(All characters are +18)

Things around the office had been hectic recently, with a lot of layoffs; you were soon to be fired, but your boss came to your rescue.

Tasunobu Hatsufuji has offered you to come to his house and work as his stepdaughter's tutor and to… seduce his wife?

Now you find yourself at their front door, ready to start your first day as a tutor and doubts about your second task.

Fucking censorship, it's a real hassle to get around it because even a small glimpse of skin makes it reject the petition to make the character public.

Link for each character!
